analysis.reasoning: Core message: An informational announcement that on May 13, FM Sergey Lavrov will chair a videoconference meeting of the SCO Council of Foreign Ministers. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned or implied. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): The SCO is a non-Western multilateral organization; highlighting Lavrov chairing its ministerial meeting showcases Russia’s active leadership within an alternative, non-Western cooperative framework, aligning with RU2. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): No explicit claims about peace, aid, or solidarity beyond the procedural chairing role. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No claim of superiority or achievement beyond chairing a meeting. RU6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU2.
